prs_created.description: fix: add removeUndefinedValues to marshall calls in updateItem and batchGetItems
fix: retry UnprocessedKeys in batchGetItems with exponential backoff
fix: apply expressionAttributeKey to IN filter value placeholders
fix: correct ExpressionAttributeNames for hyphenated attributes in updateItem remove

2.title: refactor: replace Object.assign({}) with {} and fix rangKey typo

4.title: fix: add ReturnConsumedCapacity and removeUndefinedValues to deleteItem

5.title: test: add missing coverage for updateItem, putItem, deleteItem, getItems

6.title: fix: resolve TypeScript type error in consumedCapacityMiddleware

notes: Open Repo Assist PRs: #7 (marshall fix), #8 (batchGetItems UnprocessedKeys retry), #9 (mapInKeys expressionAttributeKey fix), plus new PR this run (removeAttributeNames double-escape fix). Issue #10: CI caching blocked by protected file permission - maintainer must apply manually. Issue #1: auth-failure, expired May 1. Do NOT re-propose: cosmetic Object.assign/{} (PR #2 declined). All deps up to date as of 2026-04-25. Bugs fixed this run: removeAttributeNames applied expressionAttributeKey twice causing REMOVE on hyphenated attrs to silently target wrong attribute.
